channel.title: Canvas-Apps on Ibrahim Stephenson
channel.description: Recent content in Canvas-Apps on Ibrahim Stephenson

item.title: Generative Pages in Model-Driven Apps: A Practical Guide
item.description: If you haven’t been living under a rock you should have heard about generative pages by now. Essentially it’s a full React page created using prompts, no code needed, no drag and drop. Nothing. Just talk to the AI and it will create a functional site.

item.title: Building a Self-Service Knowledge Portal That Runs Itself
item.description: The worst kind of support ticket is the one that didn’t need to be raised.
